text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is a special day—it's the day Hishi Amazon
and I will start taking on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's go! It's you and me, baby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And Hishi Amazon is engaged in a one-on-one.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, Hishiama's as amazing as ever! Knock 'em
down!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text: Nah, our dorm leader is gonna be on top! Look, she snapped up the lead, just like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both racers fly down the homestretch after
rounding the fourth corner. Fuji Kiseki pushes
forward, completely composed. She's got a grip
on the lead, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon scoffs.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna looooose!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're not getting past me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is ablaze with passion as she flies
down the track and quickly closes in on Fuji
Kiseki...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two sprint for the finish line in unison amid
roaring cheers from the audience.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Graaah! I smashed my way through!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've gotten really good. That race sent tingles
down my spine.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. My debut is right around the corner, so I
put in my all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But you were on fire today too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Consider this your parting gift.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Aim high in the Twinkle Series—and never settle
for second, Hishiama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You're a good one, Fuji! You really are!

text_block_list.name: Underclassmen
text_block_list.text: Squeee! Even their conversations are intense!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: "Squeee?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon looks up and is startled by the
crowd of younger students waving at her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Where did they come from?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming! I hope you all enjoyed my
spectacular send-off race for Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hang on a sec! Did you just make this your
parting gift to me 'cause there's an audience
watchin' us?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, get your arm from around my shoulders, and
quit tryin' to look all buddy-buddy! And stop
waving at 'em! You're not fooling me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The younger students' enthusiastic cheering
echoes under the blue sky long after the race.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what an intense race. I learned a lot after
watching it.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text:
Well, our Hishiama pours her heart and soul into
every one-on-one she runs, so of course it was
intense!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text:
I've been wondering about this for a while, but
why does Hishiama like to compete so much
anyway?

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text: Let's see... If I remember correctly, it's because...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overhearing their conversation, I remember what
Hishi Amazon said when I asked her that myself...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I guess I get it from my mom.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She ran in races all over the world, you know?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I really look up to her, and she's the reason why I
got interested in racing too!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that makes sense. With a mom like that,
anyone'd wanna be a racer.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text:
But Hishiama doesn't just do normal races, she's
all about the one-on-ones!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text: ...But what makes them one-on-ones, specifically?

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text: Well that's because... Wait, why are they called one-on-ones?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never given it much thought, but I wonder
why Hishi Amazon likes to call races
"one-on-ones"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a mental note to ask her later, but it turns
out I don't have to.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to make you tag along to my training sesh,
Teach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Hishi Amazon while she does her stretches
by the river, but suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Bono and Biko
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus, a hero-loving Umamusume, and
Hishi Akebono, an Umamusume big in both heart
and body, run full speed under the overpass.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh. They're havin' a one-on-one under the
overpass, eh? Now that takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, when I was young, I duked it out with
someone under an underpass like this one.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I think it started over a silly turf war. I challenged
some big shot kid from the next town over.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...You know, that might have been my first ever
one-on-one.

text_block_list.name: Bono and Biko
text_block_list.text:
Full throttle all the waaay!
I'm gonna be the one to win this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus is right behind Hishi Akebono. The
two are neck-and-neck, and I can't look away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Those two remind me of her. She was a great
runner who radiated passion.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I knew goin' into the challenge that it'd be
intense, but running with her myself,
side-by-side—it was more than I could've
imagined.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the sun sets and turns everything gold, the two
hurtle toward their goal along the riverbank,
almost colliding into each other.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
As a kid, I was shocked to realize something so
fun existed.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! It's my win today! I beat you, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I can't believe you caught up with me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Gosh, you've gotten even faster, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two continue their friendly conversation
under the overpass. They've yet to notice us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tackling competition head-on and letting her
passion burn—that's what a one-on-one means to
Hishi Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm slowly starting to understand why she thinks
about races in the same way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's why I can't wait for the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I get tingles just imagining the one-on-ones I'll be
gettin' up to!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You'd better keep it up and continue supportin'
me throughout it, all right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now then... Hey, you two, you better give it a rest
soon! It looks like it's about to rain, and you
wouldn't want to catch a cold out here!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's, Hishiama! Can't we run just a little bit
more?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we just wanna race a little longer!
Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll whip up my special carrot steak for you if you
go back now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: No way! You will? Yippee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two rush off home to the dorm. Hishi Amazon
watches them go with a gentle look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Those two sure are a handful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins my journey through the Twinkle
Series with Hishi Amazon, who's passionate,
dynamic, and a little motherly too.
